name: Creole Spoon Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, heat milk until almost simmering.
2. Stir in cornmeal until smooth.
3. Stir in shrimp, green bell pepper, parsley, onion, shortening, and hot pepper sauce.
4. Bring to a boil over medium heat; cook, stirring constantly, for 1 minute longer.
5. Remove from heat and cool slightly.
6. Stir egg yolks into the cornmeal mixture.
7. Beat egg whites until stiff but not dry; fold into the cornmeal mixture.
8. Turn batter into a well-greased 2-quart baking dish.
9. Bake in a preheated 375°F oven for 45 to 50 minutes, or until golden brown.
10. Meanwhile, make sauce by melting butter in a saucepan and blending in flour.
11. Gradually stir in milk, cooking over medium heat, stirring constantly, until thickened.
12. Stir in catsup and Worcestershire sauce.
13. Serve spoon bread with sauce.
